issues_before_repair.message: Back matter heading was detected inside clean body.
Publisher header/footer boilerplate remains in body text.
Many figure/table caption paragraphs remain in body text.

issues_after_repair.message: Many figure/table caption paragraphs remain in body text.

repairs_applied.message: Removed back matter from clean body and parsed reference-like tail entries.
Trimmed title/authors/abstract/front matter before main body heading: ## 1. Introduction
Moved figure captions out of clean body.
Moved table captions out of clean body.
Moved table-like blocks out of clean body.
Normalized inline/display math spans inside clean body.
Dropped equation candidates that looked like prose/table labels rather than formulas.
Normalized formula spacing, common OCR symbols, and simple LaTeX temperature/unit forms.

headings: ## 1. Introduction
## 2. Inter-scale stiffness propagation method with stochastic porosity
## 3. Matrix-scale RVE model of stochastic pores
## 4. Statistical features and modeling of porosity field
## 4.1. Statistical features of pores field
## 4.2. Statistical features of porosity field
## 4.3. Statistical modeling of porosity field covariance
## 5. Statistical feature of matrix-scale effective properties
## 5.1. Stiffness and porosity sampling of RVE size
## 5.2. FE-based homogenization procedure
## 5.3. Stiffness and porosity variance decay with RVE size
## 5.4. Joint distribution modeling of stiffness-porosity
## 6. Composite-scale FE model with nonintrusive pores
## 6.1. Nonintrusive mesh-level sampling in composite scale
## 6.2. Computational efficiency
## 7. Results and discussions
## 7.1. Statistical features of pore and porosity
## 7.2. Joint distribution of stiffness-porosity
## 7.3. Mesh independence and correlation discretization effects
## 7.4. Stochastic FE demonstration
## 8. Conclusion
